name: AniList Adult Content Guard
description: Stops episode progress for Adult-flagged anime from ever syncing to AniList, across online streaming, local files, and torrent/debrid playback.
author: RyanCodeAI
notes: Toggle from the tray icon. Only blocks progress/status updates (what drives AniList's 'watched episode X' activity posts) for media where isAdult is true - manual score/list edits and non-adult titles are untouched.
